Package org.rodinp.internal.core

Class RodinDBManager

java.lang.Object
org.rodinp.internal.core.RodinDBManager
All Implemented Interfaces:
EventListener, org.eclipse.core.resources.ISaveParticipant
public class RodinDBManager extends Object implements org.eclipse.core.resources.ISaveParticipant
The RodinDBManager manages instances of IRodinDB. IElementChangedListeners register with the RodinDBManager, and receive ElementChangedEvents for all IRodinDBs.

The single instance of RodinDBManager is available from the static method RodinDBManager.getRodinDBManager().

  • Field Details

    • WITH_RELATIONS

      public static final boolean WITH_RELATIONS
      Tells whether item relations should be active. This is an experimental feature targeted for Rodin 3.0.

  • Constructor Details

    • RodinDBManager

      private RodinDBManager()
      Constructs a new RodinDBManager

  • Method Details

    • valueOf

      public static IRodinElement valueOf(org.eclipse.core.resources.IResource resource, IRodinProject project)
      Returns the Rodin element corresponding to the given resource, or null if unable to associate the given resource with a Rodin element.

      The resource must be one of:

      • a project - the element returned is the corresponding IRodinProject
      • a Rodin file - the element returned is the corresponding IRodinFile
      • the workspace root resource - the element returned is the IRodinDB

      Calling this method has the side effect of creating and opening all of the element's parents if they are not yet open.

    • valueOf

      public static RodinElement valueOf(org.eclipse.core.resources.IFile file, IRodinProject project)
      Returns the Rodin element corresponding to the given file, its project being the given project. Returns null if unable to associate the given file with a Rodin element.

      The file must have an associated content type which is a subtype of the Rodin content type.

      Calling this method has the side effect of creating and opening all of the element's parents if they are not yet open.

    • configurePluginDebugOptions

      public void configurePluginDebugOptions()
      Configure the plugin with respect to option settings defined in ".options" file

    • getDeltaProcessor

      public DeltaProcessor getDeltaProcessor()

    • getBuffer

      public Buffer getBuffer(RodinFile rodinFile)
      Returns the buffer for the given Rodin file.

    • getInfo

      public OpenableElementInfo getInfo(Openable element)
      Returns the info for the given element, if it's open (has been loaded into the database). Otherwise returns null.
      Parameters:
      element - the element for which info is asked
      Returns:
      the info associated to the given element, or null is the given element is not opened

    • getRodinDB

      public final RodinDB getRodinDB()
      Returns the handle to the active Rodin database.

    • getRodinDBManager

      public static final RodinDBManager getRodinDBManager()
      Returns the singleton RodinDBManager

    • getLastBuiltState

      public BuildState getLastBuiltState(org.eclipse.core.resources.IProject project, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor)
      Returns the last built state for the given project, or null if there is none. Deserializes the state if necessary. For use by image builder and evaluation support only

      public RodinDBManager.PerProjectInfo getPerProjectInfo(org.eclipse.core.resources.IProject project, boolean create)

    • getTemporaryCache

      public RodinDBManager.OpenableMap getTemporaryCache()
      Returns the temporary cache for newly opened elements for the current thread. Creates it if not already created.

      private File getSerializationFile(org.eclipse.core.resources.IProject project)
      Returns the File to use for saving and restoring the last built state for the given project.

      public Buffer peekAtBuffer(RodinFile rodinFile)
      Returns the buffer for the given Rodin file without disturbing the cache ordering, nor creating the buffer if absent.
